response.justification: Bogdan brings highly relevant, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly aligning with the role's focus on AI-driven development. He also has proven experience designing high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second and a strong foundation in agile practices and software craftsmanship. While his lack of Python experience is a notable gap against the must-have requirements, his deep systems thinking, staff-level technical strategy experience, and exact match on the AI/agentic mindset make him a strong candidate to interview.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Proven ability to design high-throughput distributed systems, previously handling millions of requests per second.
Strong software craftsmanship background with extensive experience in TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies.
concerns: Lacks the must-have strong Python experience required for the role.
No explicit mention of participating in out-of-hours on-call rotations or incident response leadership.
History of relatively short tenures across numerous companies, which may raise questions about long-term operational ownership.
